description_long: This is a modern upright vacuum cleaner with a predominantly blue and black color scheme, featuring a robust cylindrical base and a telescoping vertical shaft. The base is rounded and appears to house the motor and dust collection system, with a visible seam suggesting an access panel or removable dust bin. The shaft includes two articulated joints, likely for adjusting the height and angle, and a prominent handle at the top for maneuvering. The handle is ergonomically shaped with a visible grip area, and there are several buttons or controls integrated into the upper section. The vacuum cleaner is equipped with at least two visible wheels at the base for mobility, and the overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for urban cleaning tasks. No visible power cord is present, suggesting a possible battery-powered design.
description: A sleek, blue and black upright vacuum cleaner with a cylindrical base, articulated shaft, ergonomic handle, and visible wheels for easy movement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical base, articulated shaft, and the handle with a visible grip area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the handle, shaft joints, and the rear section of the base.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the profile of the articulated joints, the side of the base, and the wheel placement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other profile of the shaft, base, and a clear view of the handle's ergonomic design.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is ergonomically shaped, located at the top of the shaft, with a contoured grip and integrated control buttons.
attribute_wheel_type: Two medium-sized, rounded wheels at the base, likely made of hard plastic or rubber for smooth rolling.
